title: ligularia retusa
intro: Ligularia retusa, also known as the Chinese fox tail or Japanese ligularia, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Ligularia retusa include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating various respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and pneumonia. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or a tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in herbal preparations.
